languages.text: {n}На платформе, под прицелом излучателей неизвестного ксеноустройства, распята мощная фигура в темных доспехах. Несомненно, это один из {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Астартес{/g}, и он еще жив. Странные оковы, состоящие из света, удерживают его по рукам и ногам.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}На платформе, под прицелом излучателей неизвестного ксеноустройства, распластана мощная фигура в темных доспехах. Несомненно, это один из {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}космодесантников{/g}, и он еще жив. Странные оковы, состоящие из света, удерживают его по рукам и ногам.{/n}

languages.text: {n}A powerful figure in dark armour lies sprawled on the platform, under the light of emitters from the unknown xenodevice. It is undoubtedly one of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g}, and he is still alive. Strange shackles made of light restrain his arms and legs.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}На платформе, под прицелом излучателей неизвестного ксеноустройства, распята мощная фигура в темных доспехах. Несомненно, это один из {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Астартес{/g}, и он еще жив. Странные оковы, состоящие из света, удерживают его по рукам и ногам.{/n}

{n}A powerful figure in dark armour lies sprawled on the platform, under the light of emitters from the unknown xenodevice. It is undoubtedly one of the Space Marines, and he is still alive. Strange shackles made of light restrain his arms and legs.{/n}

{n}A powerful figure in dark armour lies sprawled on the platform, under the light of emitters from the unknown xenodevice. It is undoubtedly one of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g}, and he is still alive. Strange shackles made of light restrain his arms and legs.{/n}

{n}A powerful figure in dark armour lies sprawled on the platform, under the light of emitters from the unknown xenodevice. It is undoubtedly one of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g}, and he is still alive. Strange shackles made of light restrain his arms and legs.{/n}

languages.text: {n}闇の鎧を纏った強大な存在がプラットフォームに横たわっている。未知の異星兵器から放たれる光が彼を照らしている。それは間違いなくスペースマリーンの一員であり、彼はまだ生きている。光でできた奇妙な鎖が彼の腕と足を拘束している。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A powerful figure in dark armour lies sprawled on the platform, under the light of emitters from the unknown xenodevice. It is undoubtedly one of the Space Marines, and he is still alive. Strange shackles made of light restrain his arms and legs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 闇の鎧を纏った強大な存在がプラットフォームに横たわっている。未知の異星兵器から放たれる光が彼を照らしている。それは間違いなくスペースマリーンの一員であり、彼はまだ生きている。光でできた奇妙な鎖が彼の腕と足を拘束している。

languages.text: {n}Una poderosa figura con armadura oscura yace estirada en la mesa, bajo la luz de los emisores del xenodispositivo. Sin duda, pertenece a los {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} y sigue vivo, pero unos extraños grilletes de luz sujetan sus brazos y piernas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A powerful figure in dark armour lies sprawled on the platform, under the light of emitters from the unknown xenodevice. It is undoubtedly one of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g}, and he is still alive. Strange shackles made of light restrain his arms and legs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Una poderosa figura con armadura oscura yace estirada en la mesa, bajo la luz de los emisores del xenodispositivo. Sin duda, pertenece a los {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} y sigue vivo, pero unos extraños grilletes de luz sujetan sus brazos y piernas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一个身穿深色盔甲的魁梧身影瘫倒在平台上，置身于那不明异形装置发出的光线之下。那无疑是一名活着的{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}阿斯塔特{/g}。奇异的光线镣铐锁住了他的四肢。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A powerful figure in dark armour lies sprawled on the platform, under the light of emitters from the unknown xenodevice. It is undoubtedly one of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g}, and he is still alive. Strange shackles made of light restrain his arms and legs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一个身穿深色盔甲的魁梧身影瘫倒在平台上，置身于那不明异形装置发出的光线之下。那无疑是一名活着的{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}阿斯塔特{/g}。奇异的光线镣铐锁住了他的四肢。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eine Gestalt in dunkler Rüstung liegt im Licht der Sender des unbekannten Xenogerätes ausgestreckt auf der Plattform. Es ist zweifellos einer der {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g}, und er lebt noch. Seine Arme und Beine sind mit seltsamen Ketten aus Licht gefesselt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A powerful figure in dark armour lies sprawled on the platform, under the light of emitters from the unknown xenodevice. It is undoubtedly one of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g}, and he is still alive. Strange shackles made of light restrain his arms and legs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eine Gestalt in dunkler Rüstung liegt im Licht der Sender des unbekannten Xenogerätes ausgestreckt auf der Plattform. Es ist zweifellos einer der {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g}, und er lebt noch. Seine Arme und Beine sind mit seltsamen Ketten aus Licht gefesselt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Koyu renkli zırh içindeki güçlü bir figür, bilinmeyen zeno cihazının yayarlarının ışığı altında platforma serilmiş yatıyor. Şüphesiz bir {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} ve hâlâ hayatta. Işıktan yapılmış tuhaf prangalar, kollarını ve bacaklarını tutuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A powerful figure in dark armour lies sprawled on the platform, under the light of emitters from the unknown xenodevice. It is undoubtedly one of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g}, and he is still alive. Strange shackles made of light restrain his arms and legs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Koyu renkli zırh içindeki güçlü bir figür, bilinmeyen zeno cihazının yayarlarının ışığı altında platforma serilmiş yatıyor. Şüphesiz bir {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g} ve hâlâ hayatta. Işıktan yapılmış tuhaf prangalar, kollarını ve bacaklarını tutuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Une silhouette imposante vêtue d'une armure sombre gît sur la plateforme, baignée dans la lumière produite par les émetteurs de l'appareil xénos inconnu. Cela ne fait aucun doute : il s'agit d'un membre de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g}. Et contre toute attente, il est encore en vie, bien qu'entravé par d'étranges chaînes de lumière.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A powerful figure in dark armour lies sprawled on the platform, under the light of emitters from the unknown xenodevice. It is undoubtedly one of the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g}, and he is still alive. Strange shackles made of light restrain his arms and legs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Une silhouette imposante vêtue d'une armure sombre gît sur la plateforme, baignée dans la lumière produite par les émetteurs de l'appareil xénos inconnu. Cela ne fait aucun doute : il s'agit d'un membre de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusAstartesGlossary}Astartes{/g}. Et contre toute attente, il est encore en vie, bien qu'entravé par d'étranges chaînes de lumière.{/n}
